title: Maulers

{{Quote|The only thing worse than Skaak's is Maulers. They've got the RSF riled up on Naboo.|[[Radeld Siwar]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:WfR">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Smuggler|Working for Radeld|Naboo}}</ref>}}
The '''Maulers''' were a group of criminals active on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
{{Quote|There's a group of assas...er, I mean to say, exterminators who are well known for their skills.|A patron, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ap">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|a patron|Naboo}}</ref>}}
[[File:Maulersswg.png|thumb|left|150px|An [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and a [[Human/Legends|Human]] Mauler stand guard at an encampment.]]
The Maulers were a group of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] and thugs who followed the teachings of the presumed late [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Most Maulers were not [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], but extremely brutal and violent. They inhabited an area of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] once populated with peaceful philosophers.<ref name="CDHZ" /> They were typically seen in red and black clothing, in honor of Maul's tattoos.

Mauler [[Beastmaster/Legends|beast masters]] trained [[Veermok/Legends|veermoks]] for fighting.<ref name="SWG:MS" />

==History==
{{Quote|I want you to do some investigating. Check out the Maulers, I want to know what they're up to.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSI">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Typho - Stronghold Infiltration|Naboo}}</ref>}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] increased their activities in response to the trouble caused by the Maulers. This interfered with the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations of the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] smuggler [[Radeld Siwar]], who sent a young smuggler to deal with this problem. The smuggler ambushed and killed several Maulers near [[Mauler Stronghold|their stronghold]] to quiet them down.<ref name="SWG:WfR" />

Around the same time, a patron in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] hired the Maulers for an assassination but the criminals took the money and did not bother to execute the contract. The patron later tried to take his revenge by revealing the location of their stronghold.<ref name="SWG:ap" /> [[Roric V`lia]], a [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]] and employer of [[Vaik'anna Silverlight]], sometimes used the services of the Maulers.<ref name="SWG:VS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Vaik'anna Silverlight|Naboo}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Maulers planned planet-wide criminal activities on Naboo, but their operations were thwarted by agents of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. The [[Royal Security Police Force]] [[Royal Security Forces police raid on Mauler base|raided]] the [[Mauler Apprentice Camp]] and the Mauler Stronghold near the city of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. They eliminated a Mauler warlord known as the [[Mauler Usurper]],<ref name="SWG:TPW" /> but failed to capture the Mauler Leader [[Doogal Belstar]], killing him during the [[Capture of Doogal Belstar|operation]].<ref name="SWG:TMPW" /> Around the same time, the Mauler Stronghold was also [[Royal Security Forces marines raid on Mauler base|targeted]] by the [[Royal Marine Regiment]]. Weapons caches were confiscated<ref name="SWG:TSI" /> and four Mauler leaders were eliminated: the chief tactician [[Zolo Sartain]], the [[Chief of Security/Legends|chief of security]] [[Yarick Tempol]], the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Xylan Kee'choap]] and the mystic [[Walus Mutin]].<ref name="SWG:TSE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Typho - Stronghold Elimination|Naboo}}</ref>

Later, [[Vance Groten]] recruited RSF agents to eliminate a group of Maulers near the city of [[Dee'ja Peak/Legends|Dee'ja Peak]].<ref name="SWG:HKDPS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Help Keep Dee'Ja Peak Safe|Naboo}}</ref>

[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] later sent a spacer to recover a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] artifact that the Maulers had stolen. The spacer killed the Mauler Master [[Driton Fitch]] in the [[Mauler Bunker]] and recovered the artifact.<ref name="SWG:RtGAsbtM" />
